/usr/bin/cc -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/core/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/core/init.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/core/lua_bindings.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/net/net.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/auth/auth.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/crypto/crypto.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/sandbox/sandbox.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/json/json.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/fs/fs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/process/process.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/mcp/mcp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/llama/llama.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cli-agent.dir/src/agent/agent.c.o" -o cli-agent  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/liblua-5.4.so /usr/lib/libm.so /usr/local/lib/libcurl.so -lpthread
